Overview

Sofia is a city in Sofia City with a population of 1,249,000. Bulgaria’s vibrant capital, set against the backdrop of Vitosha Mountain, with a mix of Roman ruins, Orthodox churches, Soviet architecture, and a thriving tech scene.
